ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-08-2021 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger S. Gross, via CourtCall, counsel for Steven Rabkin, Amdinistrator.

The Court inquired as to why a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status of Administration have not been filed. Mr. Gross reports that a petition was submitted for efling on MAR-03-2021 but has yet to be processed. Clerk confirms that a petition is pending in the efiling queue.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to MAR-22-2021 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods/Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
